subcodes.title: Words spoken in 1911
subcodes.first_line: In this monajotte that we have just listened to... Strive day and night and do whatever is possible that perchance you may wake
subcodes.subjects: @transcending the material condition, @spiritual transformation, @transience; worthlessness of the physical world, @materialism; material vs. spiritual civilization, @worldliness vs. other-worldliness, @call to action, @spiritual meetings; gatherings; devotional gatherings; feasts
